claim: State the core page message in one sentence.
visual_anchor: Describe the dominant visual object or focal point.
weight_center: right-heavy with a strong foreground anchor

composition.structure: two-zone composition with left headline and right hero visual
composition.alignment_logic: headline block and support metadata share a left grid; hero visual stays inside a right frame
composition.asymmetry: content is left-aligned while image mass sits on the right
composition.image_usage: hero image plus subtle texture layer
highlight_grammar: single accent color for signal labels

why_it_works: The page has a clear focal anchor before the reader enters the text.
Text and image establish asymmetry without breaking alignment discipline.
The image treatment adds energy without overwhelming the message.
anti_patterns: Do not flatten the hero visual into a tiny decorative thumbnail.
Do not let support labels drift off the main text grid.

adaptation_notes: Preserve the focal hierarchy and grid relationship.
Swap the hero visual according to the page topic, not by style alone.
